name: Roblox Corporation
description: Roblox Corporation is an American video game developer based in San Mateo, California. Founded in 2004 by David Baszucki and Erik Cassel, the company is best known for developing Roblox, a global online platform that allows users to create, share, and play games developed by others. Since its public listing on the New York Stock Exchange in 2021, Roblox has evolved into a significant social and gaming ecosystem, focusing on immersive 3D experiences and virtual communication, while continuing to expand its technology through strategic acquisitions and platform enhancements.
